unit: parsePlan() lib + types + synthetic unit tests

contract.goal: Implement a pure, typed parsePlan(text) in plugins/loom/cli/lib/plan.ts that parses PLAN.md into a typed tree (phases first-class + indexed, optional milestone grouping, per-phase goal + exitCriteria + dependencies, plan/phase-level whiteboard + loop-strategy), returning { plan, diagnostics } under lenient-with-diagnostics tolerance. Cover with synthetic-fixture unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: parsePlan(text: string): ParsePlanResult exported from lib/plan.ts; pure (no fs/clock/network); mirrors manifest.ts patterns; no path-taking variant

Types in types.ts: ParsedPlan (phases + phasesById + milestones? + loopStrategy? + whiteboard?), ParsedPhase (id:string, name, milestone?, goal?, exitCriteria:string[], dependsOn:string[], whiteboard?), Milestone, PlanMilestoneRef, Diagnostic (code + line + severity structural|cosmetic + message), ParsePlanResult
Phase headings level-tolerant: 2-4 hashes, dotted string ids (no int coercion), em/en/hyphen dashes
dependsOn: 'Phase 1, Phase 2' -> ['1','2']; 'nothing' -> []; ranges 'Phases 1-6' (any dash) -> expanded; dangling ref -> structural diagnostic (no throw)
**Goal**: -> goal?; **Exit**: (alias **Output**:) bullets -> exitCriteria:string[] (opaque); no deliverables field
## Loop strategy -> plan-level loopStrategy?; **Whiteboard**: raw at plan+phase (phase overrides), not sub-parsed
Lenient: missing optional section -> absent/empty field + cosmetic diagnostic, tree still returns; only thrown error (LoomError plan-no-headings) is zero-headings input

plan.test.ts: exact-tree on synthetic fixtures (integer-milestone, dotted-id, flat-no-milestone); degradation; structural diagnostic on dangling-dep; hyphen-heading + en-dash-range acceptance; fixtures in fixtures/plan-*.md
rules_applied: Pure read-derivation: text-in/tree-out, caller owns readFileSync (mirrors manifest.ts path/text split)
Erasable/strip-only TS: no parameter properties, no */ inside block comments (// comments only); verified by real-node smoke
Zero runtime deps: hand-rolled regex line scanner, no markdown-AST
Diagnostic codes reuse the LoomError kebab-case vocabulary
TDD-shaped: synthetic fixtures own exact-tree assertions
disqualifiers: throwing on a missing optional section
sub-parsing the whiteboard DSL or exit-bullet internals

actions: Appended a Plan-parsing types section to lib/types.ts (Diagnostic, DiagnosticSeverity, PlanMilestoneRef, ParsedPhase, Milestone, ParsedPlan, ParsePlanResult) with inline rationale on the string-id and exitCriteria decisions

Authored lib/plan.ts: parsePlan(text) line scanner + exported parseDependsOn helper; level-tolerant MILESTONE_RE/PHASE_RE, GOAL_RE (with (updated) variant), EXIT_RE (Output alias), DEPENDS_RE, WHITEBOARD_RE; collectBullets/collectProse helpers
Authored 6 synthetic fixtures in cli/fixtures/plan-*.md covering the integer-milestone, dotted-id, flat-no-milestone, degraded, dangling-dep, and hyphen/range shapes

Authored lib/plan.test.ts (9 tests): exact-tree assertions, graceful degradation, structural dangling-dep diagnostic, hyphen+range acceptance, the single not-a-plan throw, and a parseDependsOn unit case

Verified: vitest 9/9 on plan.test.ts; full loom suite 159/159 (no regression from the types.ts edit); real-node strip-only smoke loaded plan.ts and ran parsePlan with no ERR_UNSUPPORTED_TYPESCRIPT_SYNTAX

changes_since_previous: First unit of Phase 1. Adds the shared PLAN.md parser lib + its types + synthetic unit tests. Consumed (read-only) by the loom CLI; the JSON verb bridge (Unit 3) and the ev-loop/ev-run migration (Unit 4) build on this.
notes_for_pr: Scope signal (single, recorded; no revise triggered): Phase 1 was widened this session from PLAN.md's literal 'phases, exit criteria, dependencies' to 'lib + consumer migration, decompose-at-runtime model' per operator decision. exitCriteria is exposed as raw strings; there is deliberately NO deliverables field (PLAN.md does not enumerate units; consumers decompose at runtime). PLAN.md Phase 1 prose to be refined to match at phase close.

Follow-up (Unit 2+): Diagnostic.line is currently 0 for all diagnostics. The missing-section/dangling diagnostics are generated in a post-scan pass that does not retain the phase heading line. Wire real source-line numbers (store heading line on the phase) when the real-artifact + diagnostics work lands in Unit 2. Flagged advisory by evaluator-contract-fit; not gating.

Naming note (advisory, defensible): the Parsed* types use camelCase (exitCriteria, dependsOn, loopStrategy, phasesById) while the rest of types.ts uses snake_case. Intentional: snake_case types serialize to disk (carry schema_version); Parsed* is in-memory parser output that never serializes. The casing split tracks the on-disk-vs-in-memory boundary.

Scope boundary for the rest of the phase: real-artifact glob test + strip-only spawnSync node smoke = Unit 2; loom plan parse JSON verb = Unit 3; ev-loop-interactive + ev-run skill-body migration = Unit 4.
